title: ERD Toolbar Layout Redesign
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing an ERD, I want a clean and intuitive toolbar with clear icons and toggle controls, so that I can customize my diagram view efficiently.
description:
Redesign the ERD toolbar layout for better organization and usability.

## Changes
1. Move "Add More Objects" button to an icon (`bi-plus-square`) on the far left
2. Float the view dropdown and settings to the right side of the toolbar
3. Add info icon with tooltip: "Customize and hide objects from your object dictionary to create different ERD views."
4. Create a vertical line separator between action icons and toggle options
5. Combine the separate expand/collapse icons into a single toggle for space efficiency
acceptance_criteria: Add More Objects uses bi-plus-square icon on the far left
View dropdown and settings are right-aligned
Info icon displays tooltip explaining ERD customization
Vertical separator divides action icons from toggle options
Single expand/collapse toggle replaces two separate icons
ux_changes: ERD toolbar reorganized with icon-based add button, right-aligned controls, info tooltip, visual separator, and a combined expand/collapse toggle.
implementation_notes: Vertical separator required switching from col-md to flex classes for proper positioning. Most changes were pushed to staging except the separator alignment.
comment_summary: Developer implemented most changes except the vertical separator alignment, which required restructuring the HTML from col-md to flex layout.
